headline: Texas Pacific Land Corporation Announces Agreement to Provide Land and Water Solutions to Chevron for a Large-Scale Power Project
summary: DALLAS, June 23, 2026--TEXAS PACIFIC LAND CORPORATION ANNOUNCES AGREEMENT TO PROVIDE LAND AND WATER SOLUTIONS TO CHEVRON FOR A LARGE-SCALE POWER PROJECT

headline: Is Texas Pacific Land Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Texas Pacific Land has trailed the broader S&P 500 Index over the past year, and Wall Street remains fairly bullish about the stock.
